meaning: n.标语,广告上或演讲词中用以吸引注意力的措辞
examples: So Nespresso's ad starring George Clooney, with the catchline “What else?”, has “Quoi d'autre?” as a subtitle.
Facebook is selling the new version of newsfeed under the catchline "Goodbye clutter", insisting that it is about making the user experience better rather than boosting its advertising revenue.
